Snivy

#0494 Victini #0496 Servine
  • Contents
  • Info
  • Base stats
  • Evolution chart
  • Pokédex entries
  • Moves learned
  • Sprites
  • Locations
  • Language

Snivy is a Grass type Pokémon introduced in Generation 5.

Snivy

Additional artwork

Pokédex data

National № 0495
Type Grass
Species Grass Snake Pokémon
Height 0.6 m (2′00″)
Weight 8.1 kg (17.9 lbs)
Abilities 1. Overgrow
Contrary (hidden ability)
Local № 0001 (Black/White)
0001 (Black 2/White 2)
0200 (The Indigo Disk)

Training

EV yield 1 Speed
Catch rate 45 (5.9% with PokéBall, full HP)
Base Friendship 50 (normal)
Base Exp. 62
Growth Rate Medium Slow

Breeding

Egg Groups Field, Grass
Gender 87.5% male, 12.5% female
Egg cycles 20 (4,884–5,140 steps)

Base stats

HP 45
200 294
Attack 45
85 207
Defense 55
103 229
Sp. Atk 45
85 207
Sp. Def 55
103 229
Speed 63
117 247
Total 308 Min Max

The ranges shown on the right are for a level 100 Pokémon. Maximum values are based on a beneficial nature, 252 EVs, 31 IVs; minimum values are based on a hindering nature, 0 EVs, 0 IVs.

The effectiveness of each type on Snivy.

Evolution chart

#0495
Snivy
Grass
(Level 17)
#0496
Servine
Grass
(Level 36)
#0497
Serperior
Grass

Snivy changes

  • In Generations 5-6, Snivy has a base experience yield of 28.
  • In Generations 5-7, Snivy has a base Friendship value of 70.

Pokédex entries

Black It is very intelligent and calm. Being exposed to lots of sunlight makes its movements swifter.
White They photosynthesize by bathing their tails in sunlight. When they are not feeling well, their tails droop.
Black 2
White 2		 Being exposed to sunlight makes its movements swifter. It uses vines more adeptly than its hands.
X
Omega Ruby		 Being exposed to sunlight makes its movements swifter. It uses vines more adeptly than its hands.
Y
Alpha Sapphire		 They photosynthesize by bathing their tails in sunlight. When they are not feeling well, their tails droop.

Moves learned by Snivy

  • In other generations

  • 6
  • 7
  • 8
  • 9
Legends: Z-A Scarlet/Violet

Moves learnt by level up

Snivy does not learn any level up moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Moves learnt by TM

Snivy cannot be taught any TM moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Snivy learns the following moves via breeding or picnics in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet. Details and compatible parents can be found on the Snivy gen 9 learnset page.

Type
Cat.
Power
Acc.

Iron TailSteel 100 75

Name origin

snake
a species of reptile
ivy
a type of plant
